title: Dictionary for open dataset #2
context: A second open-access dataset (selected from the triaged candidates, not pre-approved here) is documented end-to-end using the shared template. Binding guardrail: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access and identifiable data are EXCLUDED at gate-002; provenance on every assertion; the deliverable is documentation about the data, never the data itself. The concrete dataset is chosen via triage-011 and must carry its own committed gate-002 artifact before work starts.
objective: Produce a complete, source-verified dictionary for open dataset #2, emitted in all formats and adopted or submitted with the blocker surfaced.
acceptanceCriteria: Dataset PASSed gate-002 (accessTier: open, license permits derivatives, no identifiable data) with the artifact committed.
Complete field dictionary with coded-value meanings + sentinels; 100% provenance coverage; field coverage >= 95% (gaps listed); quality score recorded (after >= 90/100).
Valid JSON + Frictionless + Croissant emitted; validator clean in CI; crosswalks added where licensing permits.
Provenance recorded with license snapshot (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL).
Adopted upstream with acceptance evidence recorded (outcomes/<dataset-id>.json) - or submitted with the blocker surfaced.
output: output/dict-012/ dictionary (Markdown + JSON + Frictionless + Croissant) plus the committed gate artifact.
